        distances = {node: float('inf') for node in graph.keys()}
        distances[start] = 0
        queue = [start]
        while queue:

            for neighbor, weight in graph[current]:
                if distances[neighbor] > distances[current] + weight:
                    distances[neighbor] = distances[current] + weight
